---
output:
  beamer_presentation:
    theme: "CambridgeUS"
    colortheme: "dolphin"
    fonttheme: "structurebold"
    df_print: kable
fontsize: 14pt
classoption: "aspectratio=169"
header-includes:
- \usepackage{caption}
- \captionsetup[figure]{labelformat=empty}
- \captionsetup[table]{labelformat=empty}
- \setbeamertemplate{page number in head/foot}[]{}
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## Render the pdf
##rmarkdown::render(input = "./06_1-Select_Project2.Rmd", output_file = "./06_1-Select_Project2.pdf")

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```


## Today's Agenda
\Large

1. Review our presentation slides

\vspace{.25in}

2. Plan the next stage in our class research project

\vspace{.5in}

\begin{center}
Justin Leinaweaver (Fall 2021)
\end{center}



## Share / Review Slides on Moodle
::: columns
:::: column

\center
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.45\paperwidth]{Images/05_2-workshop.png}

::::
:::: column
\LARGE

+ Ideas to steal?

\vspace{.3in}

+ Themes and colors we like?

::::
:::


## Looking ahead to Assignment 3...
\Large
\center

**Do countries with greater political rights and civil liberties...?**

\vspace{.35in}

Regime Type (FH) $\rightarrow$ International outcome



## ...in order to complete Assignment 2
\Large
\center

Prepare a report **introducing** and **analyzing** our second data project.

\vspace{.35in}

Regime Type (FH) $\rightarrow$ \textcolor{red}{\textbf{International outcome}}


## Data Project 2: International Outcomes

+ UN Global Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI)
+ UN Human Development Index (HDI)
+ Yale Environmental Performance Index (EPI)
+ UN Gender Inequality Index (GII)
+ UN Gender Social Norms Index (GSNI)
+ Correlates of War (CoW): Trade Data
+ The Geocoded Peacekeeping Operations (Geo-PKO) Dataset 2.0
+ Correlates of War (CoW): Militarized Interstate Disputes (MID)
+ Correlates of War (CoW): National Material Capabilities
+ The Uppsala Conflict Data Program (UCDP)
+ Fragile States Index (FSI)


## For Thursday
\Large
Review the \textcolor{blue}{\textbf{codebook}} and the data in \textcolor{blue}{\textbf{Excel}} in order to help us complete the first two sections of the report.

+ **Section 1: Introducing the Data Project**

+ **Section 2: Analyzing the Methodology**
